studies.title: Smartphone-assisted exposure therapy for panic disorder and agoraphobia: an effectiveness study

_verification.reason: The study does not explicitly mention 'Mindable: Soziale Phobie,' its company, or provide a specific description matching the product. The study focuses on smartphone-assisted exposure therapy for panic disorder and agoraphobia, which are different conditions from social phobia (F40.1).
